items.statcast_observation: Bobby Witt Jr. produced the hardest tracked Royals contact: 106.5 mph at a -11.0 degree launch angle.
items.summary: The Royals lost to the Cleveland Guardians, KC 1, CLE 3. Cole Ragans led the night, working 3.0 innings with 0 earned runs, 4 strikeouts and 2 walks. Bobby Witt Jr. supplied the loudest Royals contact at 106.5 mph.
items.title: Royals vs Guardians Recap
